affected_pattern: Customer shows doubled MonthlyCharges with two billing entries separated by seconds
root_cause: Billing system retry logic error — the retry mechanism for a failed transaction duplicated the charge when the original transaction actually succeeded but confirmation was lost.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Billing System Retry Logic Error pattern
Two charge entries with same amount but different transaction IDs
System timeout event logged between the two transactions
recommended_action: Add unique transaction ID verification before charge posting
